summary_text: Progress: 100% (0 slices remaining). 1. **Critical: live registry-local runs are not replayable because raw fetched inputs are not persisted.** When seeds are absent, both sync and draft flows fetch live X data, but run artifacts only keep processed outputs/meta, not the fetched post snapshot needed for exact replay. Missing artifact: persisted raw posts/records snapshot per run. Refs: [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L526](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L526), [xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L233](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L233), [xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L327](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh#L327), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L183](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L183), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L227](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L227) 2. **High: silent `xai -> heuristic` fallback creates run-to-run semantic drift with weak auditability.** `auto` mode falls back silently on exceptions, and the wrapper forces `--extract-mode auto` in registry-local draft runs. Missing flag: explicit extract-mode passthrough + persisted “actual mode/fallback reason”. Refs: [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L531](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L531), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L106](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L106), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L535](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L535), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L191](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L191) 3. **High: deterministic replay breaks across days and mutable history context.** Draft IDs depend on current UTC date; similarity/diversity depends on external recent-draft input that is not snapshotted into run artifacts. Missing flags/artifacts: fixed run date (`--id-date`) and copied recent-history snapshot. Refs: [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L629](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L629), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L555](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L555), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L151](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L151), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L268](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L268) 4. **High: primary-source recovery remains stateful/network-dependent, so acceptance can flip across runs.** Recovery fetches referenced posts and author timelines at runtime with bounded recursion depth (`>2` cutoff); transient API failures can change whether candidates are review-eligible/promotable. Missing control: deterministic recovery snapshot or strict failure mode. Refs: [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L201](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L201), [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L243](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L243), [xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L249](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_quoted_author_sync.py#L249), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L587](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L587) 5. **Medium: operator-facing default mismatch can trigger unintended mode differences.**...
